title: Comprehensive molecular characterization of complete mito-genome assemblies of thirty-three Eimeria isolates infecting domestic chickens
author: Xie, Yue
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table S1: List of primer pairs for PCR amplifications and their positions in the Eimeria isolate 1 mitogenome; Table S2: Summary of the chicken Eimeria mitogenomic information included in this study; Table S3: Gene sizes in the mitogenomes of 66 chicken Eimeria parasites; Table S4: Pairwise genetic divergences of 33 chicken Eimeria parasites based on mitogenome datasets.
steps_raw: Table S1: List of primer pairs for PCR amplifications and their positions in the Eimeria isolate 1 mitogenome; Table S2: Summary of the chicken Eimeria mitogenomic information included in this study; Table S3: Gene sizes in the mitogenomes of 66 chicken Eimeria parasites; Table S4: Pairwise genetic divergences of 33 chicken Eimeria parasites based on mitogenome datasets.
